changelog:
# Changelog

## [1.2.9] - Homebrew Cask Integration

### Added
- Added `auto_updates true` to the Homebrew Cask specification. This ensures that Homebrew recognizes the built-in updater, prevents conflicts between `brew upgrade` and the application's auto-update flow, and eliminates "already an App" errors during installation/upgrade.

## [1.2.8] - Deployment and Info.plist Sync Fix

### Fixed
- Fixed deployment script (`deploy.sh`) to stage all changes (`git add .`) instead of only staging version config files. This ensures `Info.plist` and all source code updates are correctly built in GitHub releases.
- Consolidated `Info.plist` with all required standard bundle metadata keys to restore file association registration and auto-updater functionality.

## [1.2.7] - Welcome Screen Interaction Fix

### Fixed
- Fixed an issue where the "Set as Default" button on the welcome screen became non-responsive due to errors during file association setting. System failures are now safely logged, ensuring the setup flow completes successfully.

## [1.2.6] - ALAC Playback Fix

### Fixed
- ALAC playback issue where files with `.alac` extension failed to play due to `AVURLAsset` error parsing metadata. Added safe fallback to allow playback without metadata crash.

## [1.2.5] - Window Size Fix

### Fixed
- Drop zone window is no longer slightly taller than the player window — both states now use the same fixed height.
